content.text: Change the default MaxRetries to 5 in the config literal.

content.content:
cfg := Config{
	Host:       "db",
	Port:       5432,
	User:       "svc",
	PoolSize:   10,
	MaxRetries: 3,
	Timeout:    5,
	Verbose:    false,
}

 	Port:       5432,
 	User:       "svc",
 	PoolSize:   10,
-	MaxRetries: 3,
+	MaxRetries: 5,
 	Timeout:    5,
 	Verbose:    false,
 }
*** End Patch
